title: CNBC's UK Exchange newsletter: Can 'Savvy the Squirrel' drive Britons nuts for savings?
summary_full: The big guns of the U.K. savings industry have launched a campaign to persuade households to "squirrel" money away. The big question is whether it will succeed.
summary_public: The big guns of the U.K. savings industry have launched a campaign to persuade households to "squirrel" money away. The big question is whether it will succeed.
